discussion_posts.name: MeloWang0308
discussion_posts.content: This is exactly the same with # 543, find the diameter of a tree. That one is marked as easy. If you are solving this kind of splitting tree problem at the first time, don't worry at this moment because they are all the same.

discussion_posts.name: sebagomez
discussion_posts.content:
I have one of the tests failing because it is said to be expected 48, while my algo returns 55.
Counting the nodes, (running by hand) I also get 55... is there anything I'm not getting or is it a failing test?

[5,4,8,11,null,13,4,7,2,null,null,null,1]
